generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance Motor : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "A permanent magnet synchronous motor that converts electrical current (I_M) into rotational torque (τ_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance Gearbox : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "A multi-stage gear transmission system (standard gearbox + cycloidal gearbox) reducing torque and transmitting rotational motion with torque output τ_out, critical for friction modeling due to mechanical energy transfer and wear-induced friction changes"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder attached to the motor shaft measuring angular position and velocity provides data for friction analysis via comparison with secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder measuring gearbox output angle and velocity difference with motor encoder infers elasticity and friction in drive train"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring input current (I_M) via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to derive torque (τ_M) using motor-specific constants"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ_M) from current measurements using motor-specific constants"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) derived from motor encoder data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance DerivedAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived acceleration data from velocity measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) describing the first axis as motor + gearbox system with rotational (torque/velocity) and current flows"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction models to simulate ideal vs. friction-affected behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model implementing Stribeck friction model for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink simulation model implementing LuGre friction model for white-box friction modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured input current (I_M) from motor current sensors via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived motor torque (τ_M) from current measurements using motor-specific constants"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity (ω) measured from motor encoder via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredAngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from motor encoder for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance SimulatedReferenceTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference torque outputs (τ_G) from simulation models for comparison with measured values"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance SimulatedFrictionAffectedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Friction-affected torque outputs (ετ_M, ετ_G, ετ_out) from simulation models for validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MetadataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata annotation for all data traces including source origin (e.g., motor encoder, simulation model) and computation method for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredInputCurrentData, SimulatedReferenceTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool used for creating structural models (BDD/IBD) of the motor-gearbox system"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for behavioral modeling (motor dynamics, friction models) and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (motor current I_M, angular position, derived torque/velocity) to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables MeasuredInputCurrentData, MeasuredMotorTorqueData, MeasuredAngularVelocityData, MeasuredAngularPositionData, SimulatedReferenceTorqueData, MetadataTrace
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification and continuous updating of white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre) using live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionDetectionInsight
]

instance ControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of friction models into control algorithms to reduce positional errors (up to 30% attributed to friction) for improved robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance FrictionVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of measured vs. simulated data (torque, angular velocity) to detect friction loss and validate model accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataComparisonInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction losses in the gearbox system via comparison of measured vs. simulated data"
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of friction parameters in control algorithms based on real-time friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantic understanding of deviations between measured and simulated values through metadata-annotated data traces for friction model validation"
]

// C1: Environment
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Motor, Gearbox, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** time scale:
  - **Data Acquisition Rate**: Sensor data (e.g., motor current, encoders) is streamed at high frequency (implied by live measurements and continuous model refinement).
  - **Model Update Frequency**: Friction models are dynamically updated during operation to account for wear, load changes, or environmental factors (e.g., temperature).
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces and model outputs are synchronized with physical system events (e.g., robot motion commands) to ensure causality in analysis."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **centralized and purpose-driven**:
  - **Core Components**: A single digital shadow for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, integrating live data, simulation models, and visualization.
  - **Orchestration**: Data flows unidirectionally from physical sensors to the DT (digital shadow) for passive analysis, with no feedback loops to the physical system (as per digital shadow definition)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the **operational phase** of the physical system:
  - **Representation Phase**: The DT represents the robot as **operated** (actual behavior with friction effects), not as designed or manufactured.
  - **Lifecycle Scope**: The focus is on **continuous improvement** of friction models during robot operation to enhance motion accuracy, with no explicit mention of design or manufacturing phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Verification**: Comparison of measured vs. simulated data to validate friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck).
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Use of dual encoders to infer elasticity/friction in the gearbox drive train.
  - **Model Accuracy**: White-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models are combined to account for wear, load, and temperature effects, with traceability ensuring causality in deviations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection uses:
  - **Protocol**: MQTT for real-time data streaming from robot sensors to the DT.
  - **Network Architecture**: Implied real-time communication between physical sensors and digital shadow components (no explicit details on network topology or protocols beyond MQTT)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT incorporates:
  - **Modeling Standards**: SysML for system modeling, AAS for integration.
  - **Data Protocols**: MQTT for real-time data exchange.
  - **Methodologies**: MBSE (e.g., RFLP, SysML) and digital shadow reference models (DSRM) for consistency."
]
